# Adnan Khan

> Co-Founder & Managing Partner of Stitch and Co-Founder of Stitch Predict. Auckland, New Zealand. Digital transformation, customer data, marketing technology, media, AI, marketing mix modelling.

## Quick facts
- Name: Adnan Khan
- Title: Co-Founder & Managing Partner, Stitch | Co-Founder, Stitch Predict
- Location: Auckland, New Zealand

## Awards
- TVNZ Marketing Awards 2022: Supreme Award Winner, Excellence in Brand Transformation Strategy, Excellence in Consumer Products & Services Strategy
- 2x Gold Effie 2022 (Strategic Thinking, Retail)
- Global Effie Finalist 2023
- LinkedIn Top Voice — Digital Marketing

## Industry roles
- IAB NZ AI Working Group Lead
- Chair, Marketing Association Digital SIG
- Member, IAB NZ Emerging Technology Council
- Member, IMANZ Innovation & Technology Group
